_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to develop, implement, and refine strategies for decision-making in group and team settings that show leadership, collaboration, and fair play.

_source.w: We are learning to develop, implement, and refine strategies for decision-making in group and team settings that show leadership, collaboration, and fair play.
y: Effective group decision-making is one of the most valuable skills we can develop.
Leadership and collaboration look different in every context — practising them in sport builds versatile interpersonal skills.
Refining our approach based on experience demonstrates growth and maturity.
eg: Developing a team decision-making process for a sport or activity and implementing it.
Demonstrating leadership by facilitating fair and inclusive group decisions.
Refining our approach to collaboration based on feedback and reflection.
Evaluating how our decision-making strategy affected the team's performance and experience.
Discussing the balance between leadership and collaboration in effective teams.
Reflecting on our growth as a leader and collaborator over the course of the year.
